claim_boundary: Absolute charged-lepton masses carry certified intervals on the empirical closure surface; the continuum kappa freedom is excluded there. No source-only absolute mass is emitted; the trace-lift no-go and its gate remain in force unchanged.

conditional_mass_rows.formula: m_i = exp(kappa) * R_i * m_e_witness, kappa from transport inversion
m_i = exp(kappa) * R_i * m_e_witness, kappa from transport inversion
m_i = exp(kappa) * R_i * m_e_witness, kappa from transport inversion

inputs.alpha_inv_0_role: declared empirical closure input inside this solve path (CODATA 2022)

higher_order_lepton_remainder.definition: 3-loop reference Delta_lep minus one-loop asymptotic kernel at witness

ratio_provenance.scope: centered charged family functional; target-anchored checksum per charged_trace_lift_theorem.json, declared as such in this row class

interval_width_attribution_kappa_units.reduction: every dominant term reduces to the source hadronic spectral measure (#425, hadron backend / lattice lane) and the a0 scheme bridge (#545)

inversion_equation.closed_form: ln m_e = ln MZ - (3pi*packet + 2*(ln R1 + ln R2) + 5)/6
inversion_equation.decomposition: a0 + g = alpha_inv_0 * (1 - Delta_lep(kappa) - Delta_had5 - Delta_top)
inversion_equation.monotonicity: packet strictly decreasing in kappa; unique solution

reference_deficit_point.reading: at the physical on-shell anchor the residual equals the ee-payload hadronic undershoot against the KNT19 reference; the miss is carried entirely by the open hadron backend (#425)

kappa_symmetry_breaking_lemma.statement: The one-parameter countermodel Y_e -> exp(kappa) Y_e of the charged trace-lift theorem does not extend to the declared electromagnetic transport: the lepton vacuum-polarization packet satisfies d(packet)/d(kappa) = -2/pi, so the emitted Thomson endpoint and the fixed point P = phi + sqrt(pi)/A_Th(P) move with kappa. The no-go's antecedent list omits this closure; source-only the system is the stiff curve (P(kappa), kappa), and on the empirical closure surface kappa is identified up to certified interval width.

stage5_scale_consistency.reading: the Stage-5 continuation's scale-invariant content already matches the physical packet at the |kappa| ~ 0.006 level; the quarantined determinant prescription is consistency-tested, not free
